title: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in MongoDB Server's server-side JavaScript engine when...
description: A use-after-free vulnerability exists in MongoDB Server's server-side JavaScript engine when converting BSON documents to JavaScript arrays. An authenticated user with read privileges who is able to run server-side JavaScript (for example, via $where or $function) can cause the server to access memory that has already been freed. This may result in disclosure of information from the mongod process memory or a denial of service through a server crash.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The use-after-free vulnerability in MongoDB Server's server-side JavaScript engine could allow an authenticated user with read privileges to access sensitive data from the server's memory or cause a denial of service by crashing the server. This poses a significant risk to data confidentiality and system availability.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply the latest security patch or update provided by MongoDB that addresses CVE-2026-11933.
Restrict or disable the use of server-side JavaScript features (e.g., $where or $function) for users with read privileges if not strictly necessary.
Monitor server logs for unusual activity, such as unexpected crashes or abnormal memory access patterns, and implement intrusion detection mechanisms.

title: The Presto Player plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the ...
description: The Presto Player plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the 'link_url' parameter of the [presto_player_overlay] shortcode in versions up to, and including, 4.2.0 This is due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping in the getOverlays() function, which copies the link_url shortcode attribute directly into the overlay configuration without scheme validation, allowing javascript: URIs to survive and be rendered as the href of a clickable anchor element

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to inject malicious JavaScript via the 'link_url' parameter, potentially leading to data theft, session hijacking, or redirection to malicious websites. This could compromise the integrity of websites using the Presto Player plugin.
recommended_actions: Update the Presto Player plugin to the latest version once a patch is released.
Implement a Web Application Firewall (WAF) to detect and block malicious payloads targeting this vulnerability.
Audit website plugins regularly to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.

description:
An
authenticated format string vulnerability exists in the ONVIF service of Tapo
C110 v2 due to improper handling of user-controlled input.  Externally controlled data is interpreted as
a format string, which can be used to manipulate stack memory, including
control flow data such as return addresses.

title: Rejected reason: This CVE Record has been rejected by the Zephyr Project CNA. Subsequent analysis...
description: Rejected reason: This CVE Record has been rejected by the Zephyr Project CNA. Subsequent analysis determined that the addressed defect is not reachable in any released version of Zephyr: on every supported release branch the affected value is corrected before it is used, and the change that exposes the defect exists only in unreleased development code. As no released version is affected, this identifier is withdrawn.

title: Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce allows...
description:
Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce allows Privilege Escalation.

This issue affects Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce: from n/a through 1.9.4.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The Incorrect Privilege Assignment vulnerability in the Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce allows unauthorized users to escalate their privileges, potentially gaining access to sensitive data, administrative controls, or other restricted functionalities. This could lead to data breaches, financial fraud, or service disruptions.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Hippoo Mobile App for WooCommerce to the latest version if a patch is available. Monitor the vendor's website or GitHub repository for updates.
Implement strict access controls and monitor user activity for suspicious behavior, especially for privilege escalation attempts.
Conduct a security audit of your WooCommerce environment to identify and mitigate any additional vulnerabilities that could be exploited in conjunction with this issue.

title: Use after free in Views in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 149.0.7827.115 allowed a remote...
description: Use after free in Views in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 149.0.7827.115 allowed a remote attacker to potentially exploit heap corruption via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a remote attacker to exploit heap corruption by leveraging a use-after-free issue in Google Chrome's Views component. This could lead to arbitrary code execution, potentially compromising user data, enabling malware installation, or allowing further exploitation of the affected system.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Google Chrome to version 149.0.7827.115 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Implement browser security policies, such as disabling JavaScript for untrusted websites, to reduce exposure to malicious HTML pages.
Monitor systems for unusual activity and apply endpoint protection solutions to detect and block potential exploitation attempts.

title: Inappropriate implementation in Views in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 149.0.7827.115 allowed...
description: Inappropriate implementation in Views in Google Chrome on Windows prior to 149.0.7827.115 allowed a remote attacker who had compromised the renderer process to potentially perform a sandbox escape via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: High)

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a remote attacker to escape the Chrome sandbox environment, potentially leading to unauthorized access to the underlying system. This could result in data exfiltration, malware installation, or further exploitation of the compromised system.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Google Chrome to version 149.0.7827.115 or later to mitigate the vulnerability.
Enable strict security policies, such as limiting access to untrusted websites and disabling unnecessary browser extensions.
Monitor systems for unusual activity or signs of exploitation, particularly in environments where Chrome is widely used.

title: Idira Identity Browser Extension (Chrome, Firefox, and Edge builds) versions prior to 26.8.1...
description: Idira Identity Browser Extension (Chrome, Firefox, and Edge builds) versions prior to 26.8.1 exhibit an origin validation flaw within its internal web-page verification routines. If an authenticated user navigates to a specially crafted webpage, this interaction could potentially allow a remote attacker to trigger unauthorized application interaction or execution parameters within the context of that authenticated browser session. CyberArk Security Bulletin: CA26-21

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The origin validation flaw in the Idira Identity Browser Extension could allow attackers to execute unauthorized actions or manipulate application parameters within the context of an authenticated user's browser session. This could lead to data breaches, unauthorized access, or compromise of sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the Idira Identity Browser Extension to version 26.8.1 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Educate users to avoid visiting untrusted or suspicious websites while logged into sensitive accounts using the affected browser extension.
Implement monitoring and alerting for unusual application interactions or unauthorized access attempts in systems using the Idira extension.

recommended_actions: Update Google Chrome to version 149.0.7827.53 or later to patch the vulnerability.
Implement robust endpoint protection to prevent renderer process compromise.
Educate users on avoiding malicious websites and phishing attempts that could exploit this vulnerability.

title: CVE-2026-10878 - A vulnerability was detected in D-Link DWR-M920 1.1.50/1.1.70. Affected is the function sub_41C8E8 o

title: CVE-2026-10586 - The Gutenberg Essential Blocks – Page Builder for Gutenberg Blocks & Patterns plugin for WordPress i
description: The Gutenberg Essential Blocks – Page Builder for Gutenberg Blocks & Patterns plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Server-Side Request Forgery in all versions up to, and including, 6.1.3 via the `save_ai_generated_image()` function. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to make web requests to arbitrary locations originating from the web application and can be used to query and modify information from internal services.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-10586.
